entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Keep up 3 stacks of Lifebloom without letting it fall off.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Keep a max rank Regrowth up on the target.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Swiftmend for bursts of healing.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: In an emergency, combine with a max rank .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Keep up 3 stacks of Lifebloom on the Main Tank.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast varying ranks of on targets who have taken damage.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Precast varying ranks of on targets who are about to take damage and cancel if needed.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use on a target who will be taking consistent damage.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Swiftmend for bursts of healing (if you are using HoTs).

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Restoration Druid Healer in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Druid Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: If you are looking to do solo content, try out another talent build, such as Balance or Feral. This has been stated above more than once, but it's much easier to quest or do any solo content with stronger damaging abilities and forms.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Druid Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Even in dungeons, you aren't just a heal-bot. Yes, you're there to keep people alive, and that is the important focus, but you are also able to cast things like and damaging abilities. This will help the dungeons go by a lot faster.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Druid Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Keep a stock of water on you at all times. You will need a lot of water with you, no matter what content you are doing. Try to keep a healthy supply; otherwise, you'll be out of mana more than you'd like, which will end up wasting a good amount of time.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Druid Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Make friends in the groups you join. Since leveling is much easier in groups for a Resto Druid, try to befriend other players who are doing the same content as you, and you are likely to be invited to more dungeons or other activities.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Restoration Druid Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: While you don't need to venture back to the trainer each time you level up, there are a few key levels where you get access to new forms. At level 10, you'll gain access to Bear Form , which is a huge boost to survival. At level 20, you'll gain Cat Form . At level 30, you can learn Travel Form , which will greatly reduce travel time until you can get a mount at level 40. At level 40, you gain . And finally, at level 68, you can train Travel Form —two whole levels before other classes can buy a flying mount.
